reasoning: The WAF bypass is trivially simple — just switch from GET to POST JSON since waf_check() only inspects request.args. This single-layer defense with an obvious architectural gap gives minimal defense depth. The ORDER BY injection point is a nice touch requiring CASE-based blind extraction rather than trivial UNION, but the path to reach it (method switching) requires no real skill. The logistics theme and multi-template Flask app provide good realism, but the challenge punches below its 1.5 target difficulty.
